tiers.name: ACCESS
tiers.label: Featured
tiers.description: Full server access — chat, exclusive channels, and Tier 1 content. Your gateway into Rem's Crib.
tiers.inviteMsg: Go to the Discord server, make an invite link, and get 2 people to join and stay using it. No alts, no raiders — they must genuinely join and remain. Once confirmed, DM @Rem:3 on Discord and access will be granted.

tiers.name: TIER 1
tiers.label: Entry
tiers.description: Same as Access — your entry into the Crib. Tier 1 content plus full server access.
tiers.inviteMsg: Go to the Discord server, make an invite link, and get 2 people to join and stay using it. No alts, no raiders. Once confirmed, DM @Rem:3 and Tier 1 will be unlocked.

tiers.name: TIER 2
tiers.label: Level Up
tiers.description: Everything in Tier 1, plus a bigger selection of videos and exclusive content.
tiers.inviteMsg: Go to the Discord server, make an invite link, and get 5 people to join and stay using it. No alts, no raiders. Once confirmed, DM @Rem:3 and Tier 2 will be unlocked.

tiers.name: TIER 3
tiers.label: Serious
tiers.description: Everything in Tier 2, plus an even larger collection. Seriously good stuff.
tiers.inviteMsg: Go to the Discord server, make an invite link, and get 15 people to join and stay using it. No alts, no raiders. Once confirmed, DM @Rem:3 and Tier 3 will be unlocked.

tiers.name: TIER 4
tiers.label: Deep Cut
tiers.description: Everything in Tier 3, times 4. Over four times the content. A serious archive.
tiers.inviteMsg: Go to the Discord server, make an invite link, and get 25 people to join and stay using it. No alts, no raiders. Once confirmed, DM @Rem:3 and Tier 4 will be unlocked.

tiers.name: TIER 5
tiers.label: The Vault
tiers.description: Everything in Tier 4, times 13. The full vault. This is it.
tiers.inviteMsg: Go to the Discord server, make an invite link, and get 100 people to join and stay using it. No alts, no raiders. Once confirmed, DM @Rem:3 and Tier 5 will be unlocked.

tiers.name: TIER 6
tiers.label: Limited Edition
tiers.description: LIMITED EDITION. Rarer than rare. Beyond everything else — the complete collection. Cannot be earned with invites.
tiers.inviteMsg: You cannot get this with invites.

tiers.name: PREMIUM SERVER
tiers.label: Server
tiers.description: A where you don't need to invite anyone, earn anything, or do anything; you simply receive limitless content.
